response:
# Java Session Plan

## 📋 Overview

| Detail | Info |
|--------|------|
| **Language** | Java |
| **Level** | Beginner to Advanced |
| **Total Sessions** | 12 Sessions |
| **Duration per Session** | 2–3 Hours |

---

## 🗓️ Session Breakdown

---

### ✅ Session 1: Introduction to Java
- What is Java? History & Features
- JDK, JRE, JVM – Differences
- Setting up the environment (IntelliJ / Eclipse / VS Code)
- First Java Program – `Hello World`
- Understanding `main()` method
- Compilation & Execution process

---

### ✅ Session 2: Java Basics
- Data Types (primitive & non-primitive)
- Variables & Constants (`final`)
- Type Casting (implicit & explicit)
- Operators (arithmetic, relational, logical, bitwise)
- Input/Output (`Scanner`, `System.out`)

---

### ✅ Session 3: Control Flow Statements
- `if`, `if-else`, `else-if` ladder
- `switch` statement
- Loops: `for`, `while`, `do-while`
- `break`, `continue`, `return`
- Nested loops & patterns

---

### ✅ Session 4: Arrays & Strings
- 1D and 2D Arrays
- Array operations (traversal, sorting, searching)
- `String` class & methods
- `StringBuilder` vs `StringBuffer`
- String manipulation programs

---

### ✅ Session 5: Object-Oriented Programming – Part 1
- Classes & Objects
- Constructors (default, parameterized, copy)
- `this` keyword
- Methods (instance, static)
- Method Overloading
- Access Modifiers (`public`, `private`, `protected`, `default`)

---

### ✅ Session 6: Object-Oriented Programming – Part 2
- Inheritance (`extends`)
- `super` keyword
- Method Overriding
- `final` keyword (class, method, variable)
- `instanceof` operator
- Types of Inheritance in Java

---

### ✅ Session 7: OOP – Abstraction & Polymorphism
- Abstract Classes & Methods
- Interfaces (`implements`)
- Difference: Abstract class vs Interface
- Runtime & Compile-time Polymorphism
- Upcasting & Downcasting

---

### ✅ Session 8: Packages & Exception Handling
- Creating & using Packages
- `import` statement
- Exception Handling: `try`, `catch`, `finally`
- `throw` vs `throws`
- Custom Exceptions
- Checked vs Unchecked Exceptions

---

### ✅ Session 9: Java Collections Framework
- Introduction to Collections
- `ArrayList`, `LinkedList`
- `HashSet`, `TreeSet`, `LinkedHashSet`
- `HashMap`, `TreeMap`, `LinkedHashMap`
- `Iterator` & `for-each`
- Comparable vs Comparator

---

### ✅ Session 10: Generics & File Handling
- Generics (generic classes, methods)
- Wildcards (`?`, `extends`, `super`)
- File I/O: `File`, `FileReader`, `FileWriter`
- Buffered Streams
- Serialization & Deserialization

---

### ✅ Session 11: Multithreading & Concurrency
- Thread lifecycle
- Creating threads (`Thread` class, `Runnable` interface)
- `sleep()`, `join()`, `yield()`
- Synchronization
- `wait()`, `notify()`, `notifyAll()`
- `ExecutorService` basics

---

### ✅ Session 12: Java 8+ Features & Wrap-up
- Lambda Expressions
- Functional Interfaces
- Stream API
- `Optional` class
- Method References
- Date & Time API (`java.time`)
- **Final Project / Mini Application**

---

## 🛠️ Mini Project Ideas

| Project | Concepts Covered |
|---------|-----------------|
| Student Management System | OOP, Collections, File I/O |
| Bank Account App | Inheritance, Exception Handling |
| Library Management | Generics, Collections |
| Chat Application | Multithreading, Networking |
| Employee CRUD App | Java 8 Streams, Collections |

---

## 📚 Resources

- 📖 **Book:** *Head First Java* – Kathy Sierra
- 🌐 **Website:** [docs.oracle.com/javase](https://docs.oracle.com/javase/)
- 🎥 **YouTube:** Telusko, CodeWithHarry, Kunal Kushwaha
- 💻 **Practice:** LeetCode, HackerRank, CodeChef

---

## 📝 Assessment Plan

| Type | Frequency |
|------|-----------|
| Quizzes | After every 2 sessions |
| Coding Assignments | Weekly |
| Mid-term Project | After Session 6 |
| Final Project | After Session 12 |

---

> 💡 **Tip:** Practice coding daily — even 30 minutes makes a big difference!
